description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a metallic brown receiver and a matte black barrel assembly. The magazine is curved and ribbed, suggesting a high-capacity, detachable box magazine typical of tactical shotguns. The grip is ergonomic and black, designed for comfortable handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized for finger protection. The upper receiver features a rail system for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is short, indicating suitability for close-quarters use. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible fasteners and a functional, no-nonsense aesthetic.
description: A compact, brown and black tactical shotgun with a curved magazine, ergonomic grip, and short barrel, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown receiver, black barrel, curved magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile, rail system, and alignment of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and grip clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front-on view emphasizing the short barrel and the alignment of the magazine beneath the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
